title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 25–28, this part focuses on Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #27, Unknown person #28 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: That's the most patently ridiculous thing I've-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orobi! Would you honor me by having a taste?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: *FLAGS: SOBA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: This flavor is amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The noodles have a satisfyingly chewy al dente texture.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: And with each bite...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... the undeniable flavor of Soba Blooms in my mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: He didn't Blot out the SOBA FLAVOR?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd understand it if he was using top-quality flour...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BUT WHAT HE'S USING IS CLEARLY SECOND- RATE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: PA, I WANNA TRY THOSE Noodles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: One Bowl for me, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'll take three!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: YIKES! This line appeared outta nowhere!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good, good! Let me knead a fresh batch of noodles real quick.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: W- What are you doing ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What are you about to start?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Can't you tell?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: This is just plain old m/ZU mawashi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Mizul-Mawashi" is the traditional process of mixing water into buckwheat flour. Done properly, it brings each grain of flour just enough.Water to form a dough, that is perfectlyplant and chewy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Diable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ...EAU ROTATION!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: WAHA- AAT?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
